note: Frozen one-time measurement of the localized confirm prompt against the local model. The localized-prompt judge entries are not in the committed judge cache (the conservative-prompt entries are), and the local model at http://localhost:8000 is not always reachable, so these numbers are cited as frozen evidence rather than recomputed on every regen. This mirrors how benchmarks/results/AB-REPORT.md cites frozen pre/post snapshots. Refresh deliberately with `node dist/scripts/oracle/tail-defect.js --refresh-localized` (and the per-hunk equivalent) against a live local model.
